metadata.description: Dolt/DoltHub-aware beads (bd) task-tracker plugin for Claude Code — skill, expert agents, and a wired dolt-mcp server.

plugins.name: beads-dolt
plugins.description: Dolt/DoltHub-aware upgrade to the beads (bd) task-tracker workflow: a skill that surfaces visibility/no-remote root causes and the `bd dolt remote add` + push fix, five expert agents grounded in reverse-engineered bd+Dolt internals, and a wired dolthub/dolt-mcp server for SQL access to the bead graph.
